Enter the admin passcode to open the dashboard.

🎙 Webinar Admin Dashboard

0 questions · 0 messages · auto-refreshes
Loading…

📊 Push a live poll to the room

In live mode polls appear for everyone within ~20s (leave seconds blank). In evergreen mode, "Show at" is the video-second when the poll pops. Close a poll by changing its Name cell from active to closed in the Engine tab. Answers land in the PollResponses tab with name + email.

🔗 Your links

Registrationpaymegpt.com/p/qqU7Cp — share this one publicly
Live Roompaymegpt.com/p/F9FUpXdRb — canonical room (Stripe checkout works here)
Replaypaymegpt.com/p/3JcveidZJ — send after sessions
Control SheetWebinar Engine (Google Sheets) — the brain of everything
Flows & PipelineFlows · Webinar Funnel pipeline ID 305

⚙️ How the engine works

A "session" starts at the top of every hour (config scheduleMinutes). Attendees who arrive mid-session join mid-video — it never starts from zero. When the video ends: confetti, the 1-on-1 call offer, and a countdown to the next session. Everything below is a row in the Engine tab of the sheet — edits go live within ~20 seconds, no code needed.

🎛 Config keys (Type = config)

videoIdYouTube video ID (or Live stream ID in live mode)
durationSecondsVideo length in seconds — room ends when reached (evergreen)
scheduleMinutesMinutes between session starts (60 = hourly)
liveModeyes = real live stream: no seeking, no auto-end, polls/offers show immediately
forceEndedyes = close the room right now (both modes); no reopens
maxAttendees / baseAttendeesAttendee counter range
webinarTitleRoom + replay title
adminPassPasscode for this dashboard

💰 Offers & polls (rows in Engine tab)

Offer row: Type=offer, Key=id, Value=headline, Message=description, Offset=show-at-second, Name=active/closed, Price=dollars, ButtonLabel=CTA text. The buy button opens Stripe Checkout; purchases are tagged Webinar Customer and logged to Registrants.
Poll row: same pattern with Type=poll and options in Message separated by | — or just use the Push Poll tab.

🏃 Running a real live session

  • Start a YouTube Live broadcast (unlisted), copy its video ID into videoId, set liveMode = yes.
  • Keep this dashboard open — answer flagged questions on-stream, push polls between segments, keep your offer row active during the pitch.
  • When done: forceEnded = yes → room closes with the 1-on-1 call offer. Later, set liveMode = no, put the recording's ID in videoId, set durationSeconds, and forceEnded = no — you're back to evergreen with the new video.

🙋 Attendee help (copy-paste answers)

  • No sound? Tap the "🔊 Tap for sound" button — browsers start videos muted.
  • Chat not sending? They need to enter a valid email when joining the room.
  • Missed the session? Send the Replay link — same video, pause/rewind enabled.
  • Where do questions go? Ticking "This is a question for the host" routes it to this dashboard.

✅ Remaining setup

  • SMTP (Settings → Integrations) — unlocks confirmation + replay emails.
  • Two automations (Dashboard → Automations): tag Webinar Registrant → add to pipeline 305 stage Registered; tag Wants 1:1 Call → move to that stage.
  • Stripe — make sure your Stripe key is connected so the offer checkout fires.
